scripts.dev:services: concurrently "pnpm run dev:gateway" "pnpm run dev:auth" "pnpm run dev:products" "pnpm run dev:orders" "pnpm run dev:users"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter gateway-service build && pnpm --filter auth-service build && pnpm --filter product-service build && pnpm --filter orders-service build && pnpm --filter user-service build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter gateway-service test && pnpm --filter auth-service test && pnpm --filter product-service test && pnpm --filter orders-service test && pnpm --filter user-service test
